use_cases: Interactive hero sections that engage visitors with animated typography
Landing pages requiring memorable visual effects to increase conversion
Portfolio websites showcasing creative technical abilities
Brand landing pages needing distinctive animated text displays
Creative agency sites requiring unique visual storytelling elements
ai_summary: A canvas-based particle text effect that renders customizable text using colored particle systems. Particles react dynamically to mouse movement, scattering away from the cursor with configurable force and smoothly returning to their original positions. Features a warm gradient color palette and supports responsive full-screen display with adjustable animation parameters including particle density and force intensity.
